title: A CONCURRENT RESOLUTION directing the Legislative Research Commission to establish the Performance-Based Education Task Force.
abstract: Direct the Legislative Research Commission to establish the Performance-Based Education Task Force to review and provide recommendations relating to the expansion of performance-based credit; outline task force membership; require the task force to meet monthly during the 2026 Interim of the General Assembly; require the task force to submit its findings and recommendations to the Legislative Research Commission by December 1, 2026.
